heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 2292a Authorization of appropriations

children.heading: Fiscal year authorization
children.label: a Fiscal year authorization
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the President to carry out , $3,905,460,000 for each of the fiscal years 2024 through 2028, of which up to $1,757,457,000 should be made available to carry out . Amounts appropriated under this section are authorized to remain available until expended.section 2292 of this titlesection 2292(c) of this title

children.heading: Subsequent appropriations for reimbursement of additional fiscal year obligations charged against appropriation account
children.label: b Subsequent appropriations for reimbursement of additional fiscal year obligations charged against appropriation account
children.text: In addition to amounts otherwise available to carry out this part, up to $50,000,000 in any fiscal year may be obligated against appropriations under subchapter I of this chapter (other than this part) for use in providing assistance in accordance with the authorities and general policies of . Amounts subsequently appropriated under this part with respect to a disaster may be used to reimburse any appropriation account against which obligations were incurred under this subsection with respect to that disaster.section 2292 of this title

children.heading: Amounts in addition to other amounts
children.label: c Amounts in addition to other amounts
children.text: Amounts authorized to be appropriated pursuant to the authorizations of appropriations under are in addition to funds otherwise available for such purposes.section 2292(c) of this title

children.heading: United States policy
children.label: 1 United States policy
children.text: It is the policy of the United States that the funds made available to carry out are intended to provide the President with the greatest possible flexibility to address disaster-related needs as they arise and to prepare for and reduce the impact of natural and man-made disasters.section 2292 of this title

children.heading: Sense of Congress
children.label: 2 Sense of Congress
children.text: It is the sense of Congress that any amendments to applicable legal provisions contained in this chapter are not intended to limit such authorities.

children.heading: Report
children.label: e Report
children.text: Not later than March 1 of each fiscal year, the President shall submit to the Committee on Foreign Relations and the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate and the Committee on Foreign Affairs and the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives a report that describes the activities undertaken by the President over the course of the prior fiscal year pursuant to , including the amounts of assistance provided, intended beneficiaries, monitoring and evaluation strategies, anticipated outcomes, and, as practicable, actual outcomes.section 2292(c) of this title
